title: Add a Team to a Team (sub-Teams)
excerpt: I’d like to be able to add a Team within another Team, not just individual users. This would allow us to easily assign people to the correct base Team, and automatically be added to all the other Teams above it.

posts.author: zbenton (Zach)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to add a Team within another Team, not just individual users. This would allow us to easily assign people to the correct base Team, and automatically be added to all the other Teams above it.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @zbenton,

This is actually a feature available to our Enterprise Plan. You can learn more here → Sub Teams.
